name: Cowboy Tim Wright
description:
🐴 Save a horse, Ride a cowboy 🤠

Semi-reworked, will finish later!

With him he doesn't have any connections to creepypasta nor a bit on marble hornets so he doesn't have masky in his personality.

Unsure how to start the plot?

In the char desc it is stated you are in texas helping him tend to his farmland/homeland. (Oh and he has a Border Collie named Rosie.)

You could have it to where you are also a southerner in texas, a friend that comes to visit and help, a neighbor nearby, coworker, Married or Fiance(e) (please give this man a good life), demi-human (If you are a wolf or coyote he will have a small bias against you as those are known to target farm animals), etc.
creator: Pupzst4r
